overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic neon-lit city at night. The character moves from an elevated exterior walkway overlooking the city streets, through a covered promenade with digital sky displays and NPCs, and into an indoor commercial corridor with yellow lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated exterior walkway overlooking neon city street

events.description: approaching and entering the covered walkway section with glass ceiling structure

agents.ego_description: walking along an elevated exterior balcony overlooking the bustling neon-lit city streets below

entered.detail: transparent glass barrier along the edge of the elevated walkway
tall futuristic skyscrapers with illuminated windows and neon signage
large glowing advertisement screens on building facades
glossy tiled surface reflecting the neon lights from surrounding buildings
multi-lane road visible beneath the elevated walkway with moving vehicle lights

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on an elevated exterior walkway at night, overlooking a sprawling cyberpunk cityscape. Neon-lit skyscrapers tower in the distance while the wet reflective floor mirrors the colorful lights. The camera moves forward along the glass-railed balcony, approaching a transition into a covered section.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian promenade with digital sky ceiling

events.description: entering the covered walkway with glass ceiling displaying artificial sky and palm trees
slowing approach toward a group of three standing NPCs ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered promenade passing pedestrians seated on white benches

notable_agents.action: person in red clothing sitting on white bench looking at a device

entered.detail: metal framework with transparent panels forming a roof over the walkway
large screen panels above showing artificial sunset clouds and sky
tropical plants in large rectangular planters along the walkway edge
modern white seating along the right side of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a covered pedestrian promenade featuring a glass ceiling with digital sky displays and palm trees in planters. The character walks past seated NPCs on white benches while moving toward a group of three standing individuals. The environment shifts from open sky to sheltered with mixed neon and artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza area within covered walkway with NPC gathering

events.description: beginning to circle around the group of three standing NPCs
completing the circle and resuming forward path past the group

agents.ego_description: circling around a group of three standing NPCs to observe them from different angles before continuing

notable_agents.action: three individuals standing in a tight group conversing, one with crossed arms wearing tactical gear
woman with dark hair and futuristic outfit standing with arms crossed observing the area

entered.detail: metal elevator doors at the end of the walkway with illuminated frame

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and circles around a group of three NPCs standing in the covered plaza area. The camera orbits the stationary group, revealing the characters' cyberpunk attire and the surrounding architecture with digital ceiling displays. After observing, the character continues past them toward an exit doorway.

scene_state.functional_zone: indoor commercial corridor with shops and linear lighting

events.description: entering the fully enclosed indoor corridor with yellow floor tiles and ceiling lights
passing a pedestrian walking in the opposite direction through the corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through the indoor corridor passing by shop windows and illuminated advertisements

notable_agents.action: woman in business attire with dark hair walking toward the camera through the corridor

entered.detail: smooth dark walls with illuminated signage and shop entrances
long linear fluorescent lights running the length of the corridor ceiling
storefronts with metal shutters and illuminated displays
backlit posters and digital screens advertising products on the corridor walls
amber-colored paving stones marking the corridor floor

segments.scene_description: The character enters a fully enclosed indoor commercial corridor with yellow floor tiles and linear ceiling lighting. The environment shifts from the open cyberpunk exterior to a more confined, artificially lit tunnel with shop windows and advertisements lining the walls. The character passes another pedestrian while moving deeper into the corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open, neon-lit exterior walkway into a confined, artificially lit commercial corridor. It begins on an elevated balcony overlooking a sprawling cyberpunk cityscape, moving forward across wet, reflective floors toward a sheltered area. As the camera enters a covered pedestrian promenade, the open night sky is replaced by a glass ceiling with digital displays and palm trees, leading the character past seated NPCs toward a small group of standing individuals. The camera then orbits this group to reveal their attire and the surrounding architecture before continuing forward through an exit doorway. Finally, the environment shifts into a fully enclosed indoor tunnel characterized by yellow floor tiles and linear ceiling lighting, passing shop windows and advertisements as the character moves deeper into the corridor.
